Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-12-2021 Continued To Aug-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jason Louie appeared by zoom for Patricia Bell.

The Court questions whether the Executor was able to get the PNC bank accounts transferred. Mr. Louie replied "no", stated that they have attempted three times to get the letters from the Court, that two attempts were by mail and one was in person, and that they just got the letters issued a week ago. The Court raised the issue of Counsel giving notice to the pre-deceased spouse. Mr. Louie stated that it's a legacy practice in his office, that it is something that was recommended by an Examiner a long time ago and that there is no estate for the pre-deceased spouse. The Court stated that it seems like an unusual practice when no estate is open. Mr. Louie suggested a continuance to August. The Report on Status on Administration is continued to August 16, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
